calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Petitioner: Elizabeth Williams, present as Guardians Ad Litem for Minors MASON JETT WILLIAMS AND LOGAN BLUE WILLIAMS was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minors from MASON JETT WILLIAMS TO LOGAN CHASE WILLIAMS AND FROM LOGAN BLUE WILLIAMS TO MASON KANE WILLIAMS.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Off Calendar
